{{Quote|On Yn, the Jedi had laid siege to an Imperial stronghold. Tulak Hord broke the siege single-handedly! And then he pressed forward to Jedi-held Chabosh, leaving nothing but Jedi blood in his wake. I never lacked Force to feed on in those days.|Khem Val|<ref name="SWTOR 1">{{TORcite|type=conversation|[[Khem Val]]|The Master's Apprentice}}</ref>}}
'''Chabosh''' was a planet located in the [[Chabosh system/Legends|Chabosh system]] within the galaxy's [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories.]] The planet was the site of the [[Battle of Chabosh (Sith Empire)|Battle of Chabosh]] where [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Tulak Hord]], his apprentice [[Ortan Cela]], and their [[Dashade/Legends|Dashade]] [[Shadow Killer]]s [[Khem Val]] and [[Veshikk Urk]] led [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] to victory over the rebel and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] forces stationed on the planet following the [[Battle of Yn]].<ref name="SWTOR 1" /> It was during this battle that Tulak Hord performed a [[Tulak Hord's ritual|ritual]] that allowed him to draw the strength of his enemies into himself.<ref name="SWTOR 2">{{TORcite|type=codex|The Ritual of Tulak Hord}}</ref> Thousands of years later, Chabosh was home to a small [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base wiped out by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Harsh]] aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Cauldron (Imperial-class)|''Cauldron'']] during the [[Battle of Chabosh (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Chabosh]].<ref name="CSWE" />
